---
title: "Noémie Bouchard"
subtitle: "Learning Specialist II"
description: "TELUS Health MyCare"
image: avatar.jpg
group: alumni
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.jpg)


:::

## About

Former MaRSS Lab honours student. Winner of the 2021 W. J. McLelland Award (Best Honours Thesis) in Psychology. 


## Contact

- {{< fa linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://ca.linkedin.com/in/noemie-bouchard-200732215)
